ai_result.title: Delta, PA: Rescue Training
ai_result.summary: Attendees will learn and practice rescue skills such as wet exit, partner rescue, self-rescue, and emptying a kayak when it takes on water.

ai_result.title: Chesapeake Bay Environmental Center: Eastern Shore adventure
ai_result.summary: Join Michelle and Colleen for a paddle at Marsh Creek, enjoying the natural elements of the Bay.

ai_result.title: Fells Point: Mindfulness led by Phillip McKnight
ai_result.summary: Join mindfulness teacher Phillip McKnight for a 90-minute kayak session exploring techniques for being present in the moment.

ai_result.title: Solleys Cove: Paddle to ghost ships
ai_result.summary: Join Rob for a 5-mile paddle to see the ghost ships at Solleys Cove.

ai_result.title: Dundalk: Laid-back two-hour paddle
ai_result.summary: Join Michelle for a beginner-friendly paddle around Dundalk at a slow-moderate pace.

ai_result.title: Fells Point: Paddle to Pier Six with music
ai_result.summary: Join Katie and Colleen for a paddle from Fells Point to Pier Six while listening to the Little River Band.

ai_result.title: Solleys Cove Ghost Ships
ai_result.summary: Join Michelle for a beginner-friendly Friday afternoon paddle at Solleys Cove to visit the ship graveyard and explore the coves.

ai_result.title: Fells Point: Kayak availability may be limited
ai_result.summary: New-member orientation will use club kayaks, limiting availability for other members.
